//: TEMPLATE — trigger-evals.json canonical schema. Prescribed by AGENTS.md Rule 2 (cross-skill schema parity). Each skill ships one of these at evals/trigger-evals.json. Schema changes migrate every skill in the same PR; the per-skill run-static-checks.sh validates every field (presence, type, allowed values) — not just the fields the writer remembered (Copilot review of PR #5 caught the version-field gap).
//version: Required, non-empty string. Bumped when the trigger-evals dataset shape changes.

queries.query: <natural-language prompt that should trigger this skill>
<natural-language prompt that should NOT trigger this skill>
<ambiguous prompt where activation is acceptable but boundary>

//queries: Non-empty list. Each query is an object with required fields: 'query' (non-empty string), 'should_activate' (bool). Optional: 'expected_route' (string or null), 'category' (one of: positive | negative | edge — or null/absent for single-route skills). Maintain a minimum of 3 positive + 3 negative + 1 edge case to give the description-optimization loop meaningful signal.
//grading: Future: a runner that grades activation against a model lives in a future skill-curator iteration; this file is parsed and validated for now, not yet executed.
